reviews.comment:
El edificio en general está algo deteriorado connpoco mantenimiento. Le vebdria bien un buen reestiling. Ahora el personal, un espectáculo!! Atentos y muy eficientes, un gusto haber pasado por el lugar.

(Translated by Google)
The building in general is somewhat run-down and lacks maintenance. It could really use a good facelift. However, the staff were fantastic! Attentive and very efficient, it was a pleasure to visit.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3904387536841865428/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURWdDh2dUhBEAE

reviews.comment:
Sólo pasá a cargar combustible y seguí.  Baños y espacio donde venden productos muy sucio.

(Translated by Google)
Just stop by to fill up your tank and keep going. The restrooms and the area where they sell groceries are very dirty.
